name: Fontina Caterpillar

ingredients.item: loaf ciabatta bread, sliced but not right through – the loaf should hold together
Italian fontina, sliced ed 5 mm thick

method: Serves 4–6 100 ml home-made mayonnaise 1 loaf ciabatta bread, sliced but not right through – the loaf should hold together 400 g Italian fontina, sliced ed 5 mm thick 12 anchovies ground black pepper
Cook the bread in the oven for about 20 minutes until goldenbrown and crisp.
